name: Chocolate and Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate and sweet cooking chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot water. Stir until smooth and remove from heat.
2. Cool the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Beat egg whites with a rotary beater until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually beat sugar into the beaten egg whites.
5. Add the cooled chocolate mixture and continue beating until well combined.
6. Fold in the flaked coconut.
7. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls onto well-buttered baking sheets, making about 30 cookies.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) until the edges are set and cookies are still slightly soft inside, about 16 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and loosen with a spatula. Allow to cool completely on wire racks before serving.
